'''dasapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadhillite|leadhillite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadhillite|leadhillite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dasapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsæpæth|dæsæpæth]] || [[word:dæsæpæj|dæsæpæj]] || [[word:dæsæpæsh|dæsæpæsh]] || [[word:dæsæpæ|dæsæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasasapath|dasasapath]] || [[word:dasasapaj|dasasapaj]] || [[word:dasasapash|dasasapash]] || [[word:dasasapa|dasasapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasapath|dasapath]] || [[word:dasapaj|dasapaj]] || [[word:dasapash|dasapash]] || [[word:dasapa|dasapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasafpath|dasafpath]] || [[word:dasafpaj|dasafpaj]] || [[word:dasafpash|dasafpash]] || [[word:dasafpaf|dasafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasapatha|dasapatha]] || [[word:dasapaja|dasapaja]] || [[word:dasapasha|dasapasha]] || [[word:dasapaka|dasapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasapath|dasapath]] || [[word:dasapaj|dasapaj]] || [[word:dasapash|dasapash]] || [[word:dasapa|dasapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasapathal|dasapathal]] || [[word:dasapajal|dasapajal]] || [[word:dasapashal|dasapashal]] || [[word:dasapakal|dasapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasapathatha|dasapathatha]] || [[word:dasapajaja|dasapajaja]] || [[word:dasapashasha|dasapashasha]] || [[word:dasapaka|dasapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasapathan|dasapathan]] || [[word:dasapajan|dasapajan]] || [[word:dasapashan|dasapashan]] || [[word:dasapakan|dasapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasapathaoro|dasapathaoro]] || [[word:dasapajaoro|dasapajaoro]] || [[word:dasapashaoro|dasapashaoro]] || [[word:dasapakaoro|dasapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
